title: Naruto Shippuden Animations
description: Mod add-on for Japanese Anime "Naruto Shippuden"
body:
**This mod is add-on for** [**Naruto Shippuden**](https://modrinth.com/mod/naruto-shippuden)

**Required Mod:**
- [Obfuscate](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/obfuscate)


**Naruto Shippuden Animations Mod**

Enhance your ninja experience with the Naruto Shippuden Animations mod, an add-on designed to bring dynamic and immersive animations to the Naruto Shippuden Mod. This mod breathes life into your gameplay by adding smooth, visually stunning animations for jutsu, techniques, and iconic ninja actions.

**Key Features:**
- Chakra Walking: Walk on water or cling to walls with fluid chakra-walking animations, making your ninja moves feel authentic.
- Technique Animations: Unleash jutsu with new animations that make your fireballs, water dragons, and other abilities look cinematic.
- Naruto Run: Sprint through the world with the iconic ninja running animation—fast, stylish, and unmistakably Naruto!

**Standalone Use**

- If you don’t have the Naruto Shippuden Mod, don’t worry! This mod still works independently, but you’ll only experience the Naruto Run animation. Pairing it with the main mod unlocks the full suite of animations and takes your shinobi adventure to the next level.

Whether you’re exploring the vast Minecraft world or battling enemies as a shinobi, the Naruto Shippuden Animations mod is your key to a more dynamic and engaging ninja journey!
